ticket.subject: Give the WooCommerce Shipping Services Plugin another try? We can extend the free trial.
ticket.raw_subject: Give the WooCommerce Shipping Services Plugin another try? We can extend the free trial.
ticket.description:
Hello Kristin,

 We regret that you had to uninstall our **WooCommerce Shipping Services Plugin** from https://ettellon.com

 If you have faced any difficulties with the plugin, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your WooCommerce store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.


> **Did you know?**
>
> - _Our shipping plugin is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more._
> - _This plugin will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s)._
> - _Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click._
> - _Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support._



 Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

 We would like to hear from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

        We regret that you had to uninstall our WooCommerce Shipping Services Plugin from https://ettellon.com
        

        

        If you have faced any difficulties with the plugin, we can hop on a call to assist you.
        Or if you are awaiting your WooCommerce store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.
        

        

         Did you know?
        

        

         
        Our shipping plugin is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more.

comments.body:
Request #383998 "Cancel my subscription" was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #383998:

I just want to confirm the cancellation of my subscription.  I have deactivated and deleted the plugin on my woocommerce dashbaord, but I wanted to follow up with you as well.  I couldn't find an order number, but I am nicole-7827.

Customer mentioned no problem with plugin - customer migration from WooCommerce to Shopify

Informed about Shopify MCSL - customer wanted to go with Shopify shipping and not interested in any plugins for now
I will share the Shopify MCSL app details

comments.body:
Hello Nicole,

Thank you for your time on the call. It was nice speaking with you.

As requested, we will proceed with the subscription cancellation and will get back to you with an update shortly.

Regarding the Shopify solution we discussed, the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App is an advanced solution designed to streamline your entire shipping process, including displaying rates, generating shipping labels, sending tracking updates, and more.

The app comes with a 14-day free trial, and we would be happy to schedule a demo/onboarding session to assist you with the setup.

Please feel free to reach out to us anytime if you need any assistance or additional information.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Nicole,
 
Thank you for your time on the call. It was nice speaking with you.
 
As requested, we will proceed with the subscription cancellation and will get back to you with an update shortly.
 
Regarding the Shopify solution we discussed, the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App is an advanced solution designed to streamline your entire shipping process, including displaying rates, generating shipping labels, sending tracking updates, and more.
 
The app comes with a 14-day free trial, and we would be happy to schedule a demo/onboarding session to assist you with the setup.
 
Please feel free to reach out to us anytime if you need any assistance or additional information.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
We need assistance with a subscription cancellation request.

**Case Details:**
The customer on the $29 Popular Plan has requested to cancel their WSS subscription as they are no longer using WooCommerce and are migrating to Shopify.

We shared details about the Shopify MCSL app; however, the customer has decided to proceed with Shopify Shipping for now and does not require any app.

**Store Details:**

- Store URL: https://ettellon.com
- Account ID: cd5549dc-8fcd-4a85-8193-aa66170784de
- Subscription Payment ID: sub_1SLRNKDOl8P0Ke60vGIY1ynm

**Additional Information:**

- Region: USA
- Order Volume: 1 order
- Carrier Connected: UPS
- Usage: Explored both rate calculation and label generation features
- Overall Usage: Minimal
 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/NQ7ANrjPQ9j5IiZgnW6G21rvR/?name=image.png)
